title: Delicious Crumble Vegetarian Pie
description: A tasty and comforting vegetarian pie filled with a mix of sautéed aube and crumble, topped with a crunchy oat crumble.
instructions: In a pan, sauté the aube and crumble in butter until softened.
Mix in brown sugar, salt, and water.
Transfer the mixture to a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix oats and milk.
Spread the oat mixture evenly over the pie filling.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, until the crust is golden brown.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
